rationale.consensus_ari_noise_floor: ARI(consensus, gt) >= max_i ARI(method_i, gt) - 0.02 — consensus must be no worse than the best single method, within 2% measurement noise.
rationale.consensus_ari_min_absolute: Hard lower bound — if every method does this badly something is broken upstream (preprocessing, ground truth file, alignment). Published numbers for this sample fall in 0.45-0.70.
rationale.min_members_surviving: ADR 0010 requires >=2; this benchmark requires >=4 of the 5 to confidently report regression in consensus quality.

source_reference: Maynard, Collado-Torres et al. 2021. Nat Neurosci 24(3):425-436. doi:10.1038/s41593-020-00787-0
